pi_items.source: Task definition: setup_task.sh (line 8) defines TARGET_TYPE='Unsecured Excavation', which is injected into the database if not present (line 15). The same citation type is checked in export_result.sh (line 10) and verifier.py (line 14).
Environment setup script: setup_opencad.sh (line 218) creates a user with email='admin@opencad.local' and admin_privilege=3 (full admin). This is also referenced in the task description.
Environment setup script: setup_opencad.sh (line 216) hashes the password 'Admin123!' using password_hash('Admin123!', PASSWORD_DEFAULT) and inserts it for the admin user created on line 218.

privileged_info_summary: The delete_citation_type task operates on a synthetic OpenCAD-php system (a roleplay CAD system for gaming communities, not real law enforcement). The task requires logging in with admin credentials admin@opencad.local / Admin123! and deleting a citation type named 'Unsecured Excavation' from the Data Manager. These credentials and the citation type name are all created during environment setup as test data. The task verifies success by confirming the citation type is removed from the database and other citation types remain intact to prevent table truncation.
